title: Sensitive Data Endpoint Access
description: Detects access to endpoints that may expose sensitive data (database exports, configuration files, backup files). OWASP A02:2021 Cryptographic Failures / A01 Broken Access Control.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Response Code' = '200' or 'Response Code' = '301' or 'Response Code' = '302')) and (('Request URL' like '*.sql*' or 'Request URL' like '*.bak*' or 'Request URL' like '*.old*' or 'Request URL' like '*.backup*' or 'Request URL' like '*.dump*' or 'Request URL' like '*.log*' or 'Request URL' like '*.conf*' or 'Request URL' like '*.cfg*' or 'Request URL' like '*.ini*' or 'Request URL' like '*.key*' or 'Request URL' like '*.pem*' or 'Request URL' like '*.cert*' or 'Request URL' like '*.p12*' or 'Request URL' like '*.jks*' or 'Request URL' like '*.env*' or 'Request URL' like '*.htpasswd*' or 'Request URL' like '*.htaccess*' or 'Request URL' like '*/debug/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/trace/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/dump/*' or 'Request URL' like '*phpinfo*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate access to log viewing endpoints
